commands.review_summary:
The branch makes `sessions_send` accept `SendMessage`, `content`, and `text` aliases, normalizes the first non-empty body into `message`, and refreshes focused tests plus prompt snapshots.

PR surface: Source +21, Tests +58. Total +79 across 8 files.

Reproducibility: yes. Current main and `v2026.5.27` require a literal `message` field in `SessionsSendToolSchema`, so the reported `SendMessage`-only call shape is rejected by source-level schema inspection; I did not run a live model repro in this read-only review.

target.title: Normalize sessions_send message aliases
target.body:
Fixes #88146

Note: this pull request was made with AI assistance.

## Summary
- Allow `sessions_send` / `send_to_task` tool calls to pass schema validation when models emit `SendMessage`, `content`, or `text` instead of `message`.
- Normalize the first non-empty body alias to `message` before dispatch, matching the existing message-tool alias behavior.
- Add regression coverage that confirms `SendMessage` reaches the agent dispatch path.

## Verification
- `docker run --rm -v /tmp/openclaw-work.DNxJRE/repo:/workspace -w /workspace node:24-bookworm bash -lc 'corepack enable && node scripts/run-vitest.mjs src/agents/tools/sessions.test.ts'` (70 tests passed across 2 projects)

## Real behavior proof
Behavior addressed: Model-generated A2A sends using `SendMessage` no longer fail schema validation before `sessions_send` can dispatch to the target session.
Real environment tested: Containerized OpenClaw checkout using `node:24-bookworm` with workspace dependencies installed.
Exact steps or command run after this patch: `docker run --rm -v /tmp/openclaw-work.DNxJRE/repo:/workspace -w /workspace node:24-bookworm bash -lc 'corepack enable && node scripts/run-vitest.mjs src/agents/tools/sessions.test.ts'`
Evidence after fix: Terminal output copied from the container run:
```console
$ docker run --rm -v /tmp/openclaw-work.DNxJRE/repo:/workspace -w /workspace node:24-bookworm bash -lc 'corepack enable && node scripts/run-vitest.mjs src/agents/tools/sessions.test.ts'
RUN v4.1.7 /workspace
✓ agents-core ../../src/agents/tools/sessions.test.ts (35 tests) 3771ms
✓ agents-tools ../../src/agents/tools/sessions.test.ts (35 tests) 3295ms
Test Files 2 passed (2)
Tests 70 passed (70)
```
Observed result after fix: The copied terminal output shows the patched sessions tool accepted the `SendMessage` alias and dispatched the normalized body in both relevant test projects.
What was not tested: A live Anthropic/Pi model emitting `SendMessage` in a multi-agent gateway run.
